application.name: Acme Inc. Dashboard
application.description: Aplicación de gestión empresarial con panel de control, gestión de tareas, usuarios, analíticas, proyectos, equipo, categorías, transacciones, configuración y asistente de IA.

main.label: Dashboard
main.description: Página principal con estadísticas generales: ingresos totales, suscripciones, ventas y usuarios activos. También muestra una tabla de transacciones recientes.
main.descriptionEs: Página principal con estadísticas generales: ingresos totales, suscripciones, ventas y usuarios activos. También muestra una tabla de transacciones recientes.

main.label: Todos
main.description: Full CRUD task manager with data table, infinite scroll, status/priority badges. Create, edit, and delete tasks.
main.descriptionEs: Gestor de tareas completo con tabla de datos, scroll infinito, badges de estado/prioridad. Crear, editar y eliminar tareas.

main.label: Analytics
main.description: Analytics view with page views and chart area for data visualization.
main.descriptionEs: Vista de analíticas con páginas vistas y área de gráfico para visualización de datos.

main.label: Projects
main.description: Project cards showing name, status, and progress bar.
main.descriptionEs: Tarjetas de proyectos mostrando nombre, estado y barra de progreso.

main.label: Team
main.description: Team member cards with avatar, name, role and email.
main.descriptionEs: Tarjetas de miembros del equipo con avatar, nombre, rol y email.

main.label: Users
main.description: Full CRUD user management with data table, infinite scroll, role badges (admin/user). Create, edit, and delete users.
main.descriptionEs: Gestión completa de usuarios con tabla de datos, scroll infinito, badges de rol (admin/usuario). Crear, editar y eliminar usuarios.

main.label: Categories
main.description: Full CRUD category management with color dots and color codes.
main.descriptionEs: Gestión completa de categorías con puntos de color y códigos de color.

main.label: Transactions
main.description: Full CRUD transaction management with customer info, status badges, amounts in USD, and dates.
main.descriptionEs: Gestión completa de transacciones con info del cliente, badges de estado, montos en USD y fechas.

main.label: Settings
main.description: Two tabs: System (language, theme, devtools) and AI Configuration (provider, model, parameters).
main.descriptionEs: Dos pestañas: Sistema (idioma, tema, devtools) y Configuración IA (proveedor, modelo, parámetros).

secondary.label: Get Help
secondary.description: AI chat assistant with markdown rendering, code syntax highlighting, file upload, and thinking process.
secondary.descriptionEs: Asistente de IA con renderizado markdown, resaltado de código, carga de archivos y proceso de razonamiento.

/dashboard.title: Dashboard
features: 4 stat cards: Revenue ($45,231.89), Subscriptions (2,350), Sales (12,234), Active Now (573)
Recent Transactions table with customer, status, date, and amount

/dashboard/todos.title: Todos
features: Status badges: pending (pendiente), in_progress (en progreso), completed (completado)

/dashboard/projects.title: Projects
features: 3 project cards with name, status, and progress bar

/dashboard/team.title: Team
features: 3 team member cards with avatar, name, role, and email

/dashboard/settings.title: Settings
features: Tab System: Language selector (en/es/dk), Theme selector (light/dark/system), Devtools toggle
Tab AI Configuration: Provider selector, model selector, parameter sliders (temperature, max tokens, top-p)

/dashboard/help.title: AI Help
features: AI chat assistant with message bubbles

whereToFind.tasks: Go to /dashboard/todos to see, create, edit, or delete tasks.
whereToFind.transactions: Go to /dashboard/transactions to view and manage transactions.
whereToFind.analytics: Go to /dashboard/analytics to see page views and charts.
whereToFind.settings: Go to /dashboard/settings to change language, theme, or AI configuration.
whereToFind.projects: Go to /dashboard/projects to see project cards with progress.
whereToFind.team: Go to /dashboard/team to see team member information.
whereToFind.help: Go to /dashboard/help to chat with the AI assistant.

howTo.createTask: You can ask me to create a task directly in this chat! Just say something like 'create a task called...' with the details and I'll prepare it for you with a confirmation button. Or go to /dashboard/todos and click the 'New' button.
howTo.editTask: Go to /dashboard/todos, find the task in the table, and click the edit action.
howTo.deleteTask: Go to /dashboard/todos, find the task, and click the delete action. You can undo within the toast notification.
howTo.changeLanguage: Go to /dashboard/settings, in the System tab, use the language selector to switch between English, Spanish, or Danish.
howTo.changeTheme: Go to /dashboard/settings, in the System tab, use the theme selector to switch between light, dark, or system.
howTo.configureAI: Go to /dashboard/settings, click the AI Configuration tab, select your provider and model, adjust parameters.
howTo.searchApp: Press Cmd+K (Mac) or Ctrl+K to open the AI-powered search sheet from anywhere in the dashboard.
howTo.createUser: You can ask me to create a user directly in this chat! Just provide the name and email. Or go to /dashboard/users and click the 'New' button.
howTo.createTransaction: You can ask me to create a transaction directly in this chat! Provide the customer name, amount and status. Or go to /dashboard/transactions and click the 'New' button.
howTo.createCategory: You can ask me to create a category directly in this chat! Just provide the name and color. Or go to /dashboard/categories and click the 'New' button.

aiCapabilities.description: The AI assistant can perform the following actions directly from the chat:

actions.trigger: Ask me to create a new task with a title, description, priority and due date
actions.triggerEs: Pídeme crear una nueva tarea con título, descripción, prioridad y fecha límite

actions.trigger: Ask me to create a new user with name and email
actions.triggerEs: Pídeme crear un nuevo usuario con nombre y email

actions.trigger: Ask me to create a transaction with customer, amount and status
actions.triggerEs: Pídeme crear una transacción con cliente, monto y estado

actions.trigger: Ask me to create a new category with name and color
actions.triggerEs: Pídeme crear una nueva categoría con nombre y color
